q: The pupil controls the amount of light energy entering the eye. (2021)
The human eye is very similar to a camera in many aspects. (2025)
One of the unique properties of a laser beam is coherence. (2024)
The shutter speed is expressed in terms of the exposure time. (2025)
The retina is the light sensitive area of the cells, at the front of the eye. (2026)
In the terrestrial telescope a convex lens is used as an eyepiece to produce an erect final image. (2026)
